design_philosophy.theme: Light Mode (Default) - emphasizing hygiene and clarity
principles: Fusion over Imitation: SaaS precision mixed with Hospitality warmth
Density with Breathability: High data density in dashboards, but ample padding in containers
Color as Function: Violet/Rose/Blue are not just decoration, they map to Lead Status and Urgency
Motion is Feedback: Every action has a micro-reaction

containers.card: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
containers.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 hidden md:flex flex-col h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 z-40

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

cards.kpi: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-white p-6 shadow-sm

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-violet-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

login_background.usage: Full screen background for Auth pages with overlay

icons.preferred_style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 20px for UI, 24px for Nav

component_structure.export_style: Named exports for components, Default for pages

code_guidelines.state_management: Use React Context for global state (Auth, Theme), Local state for UI
code_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case)

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for Headings, use 'Manrope'.
Ensure 2-3x padding in containers for breathing room.
Accessibility: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
Interactive elements must have distinct hover and focus states.
Never use transparent backgrounds on dropdowns or overlays without blur/scrim.
Mobile First: Always ensure grid cols start at 1 and expand on md/lg screens.
